summary: Completed comprehensive testing of specification -> variant rename feature. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Variantes tab, cascading filters, intervention detail with variant relation, picking-libre with 3-level cascade. Auto-refresh fix verified (dialog remained open 75+ seconds).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/products returns products with variant_id and variant relation
Backend: GET /api/interventions/:id returns products with variant relation and resolution='variant'
Backend: GET /api/interventions/:id/fifo-suggestions returns items with variant field
Backend: Variant CRUD (create, update, delete) works correctly
Frontend: Auto-refresh fix verified - dialog remained open 75+ seconds without forced reload
Frontend: Products page shows 'Variantes' tab with list from /api/product-variants
Frontend: Products page shows 'VARIANTE' column and 'Toutes variantes' filter
Frontend: Product instances dialog shows 6 instances for 'Astra XT DR MRI SureScan' (matching stock=6)
Frontend: Intervention detail shows stock browser with CATÉGORIE/MODÈLE/VARIANTE columns
Frontend: Intervention detail shows products with 'Variante' tag and variant info
Frontend: Picking-libre page shows 3-level cascade (Catégorie > Modèle > Variante)
Frontend: Picking-libre uses variant_id in /api/instances/fifo-suggestion API call
critical_code_review_comments: All backend endpoints correctly renamed from specification to variant
Frontend components correctly use variant_id in API calls
Auto-refresh fix applied via --live-reload=false --hmr=false in ng serve script
Database schema migrated: table product_specifications -> product_variants, column specification_id -> variant_id
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test interventions and variants during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Specification -> Variant rename is complete. All backend endpoints use variant_id instead of specification_id. Frontend uses /api/product-variants endpoint and variant_id in all API calls. Auto-refresh fix is applied via Angular CLI flags. The instances dialog correctly shows RECEIVED and PLACED instances matching the stock count.

auto_refresh_fix.description: Disabled Angular dev server live-reload/HMR to prevent 30-second auto-refresh
auto_refresh_fix.verification: Dialog remained open for 75+ seconds without forced reload

backend_changes: Column: specification_id -> variant_id (on products and intervention_products)
